---
title: "Visual Information Discovery in Software Systems"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
  - name: Martin Šperka
date: "2008-02-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Znalosti 2008, 7. ročník konferencie"
  publisher: "STU v Bratislave FIIT"
  isbn: "978-80-227-2827-0"
  page: "339-342"
---
